title: mirabilis cordifolia
intro: Mirabilis cordifolia, also known as the four o'clock flower, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Mirabilis cordifolia can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to support overall health.
